Outdoor Spaces: Guests can relax on the sun terrace or in the garden. The property features an outdoor seating area, picnic spots, and barbecue facilities.
Amenities: The guest house provides a lounge, shared kitchen, and outdoor dining area. Additional amenities include a tea and coffee maker, refrigerator, and free toiletries.
Location: Located 4.1 km from Simpson University and 17 km from Redding Municipal Airport. Highly rated for quietness and room cleanliness.
Couples particularly like the location — they rated it 9.6 for a two-person trip.
hotels.description_es:

En el hostal o pensión, las habitaciones cuentan con armario, ropa de cama y un patio con vistas al jardín. hotels.name: The Cottages Hotel
hotels.description_fr:
Welcome to The Cottages, a serene yet lively boutique lodging experience in the heart of Menlo Park. Bordered by a magnificent redwood grove, this quaint paradise is just steps away from the lively energy of local shops and restaurants, providing both an avenue to lively experiences and a nourishing retreat amongst serene landscape centuries in the making.
Guests have the opportunity to indulge in a one-of-a-kind retreat stationed under a 300- year-old California Oak, which provides shade during the day, a softly lit ambiance in the evenings, and a guest experience that can only be described as “must be experienced”.
This property features 28 bright, airy, and exquisitely designed guestrooms in perfect tune with the breathtaking landscape that surrounds them.

Reno Romantic Couples Retreat
hotels.description_fr:
L’établissement Reno Romantic Couples Retreat se trouve à Reno, à respectivement 2,8 km et 2,9 km de ces lieux d’intérêt : National Automobile Museum et Pioneer Center for the Performing Arts. Il est installé à respectivement 3 km, 3,4 km et 3,5 km de : Musée d'Art du Nevada, Truckee River Walk et National Bowling Stadium. Cette maison d'hôtes comprend un sauna, un service d'étage et une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite.
Les hébergements sont dotés de la climatisation, d’un réfrigérateur, d’un micro-ondes, d’une machine à café, d’une douche, d'un sèche-cheveux et d’une armoire. Vous profiterez d'une salle de bains privative et de linge de lit.
L’établissement Reno Romantic Couples Retreat dispose d’un bain à remous.
hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: Reno Romantic Couples Retreat in Reno offers a guest house with air-conditioning, private bathrooms, and kitchenettes. Each room includes a coffee machine, refrigerator, microwave, and TV.
Relaxing Facilities: Guests can enjoy a sauna, hot tub, and outdoor fireplace. Free WiFi is available in public areas, ensuring connectivity during the stay.
Convenient Amenities: The property provides free on-site private parking, room service, car hire, and an outdoor seating area. Additional amenities include a picnic area and dining area.
Local Attractions: Located 2 km from Reno-Tahoe International Airport, the guest house is near the National Automobile Museum (2.8 km), Nevada Museum of Art (3 km), and Truckee River Walk (3.4 km).
hotels.description_es:

El alojamiento está a unos 3 km de Museo de Arte de Nevada, a 3,4 km de Paseo Fluvial de Truckee y a 3,5 km de Estadio Nacional de Bolos. El hostal o pensión dispone de sauna, servicio de habitaciones y wifi gratis.
Las habitaciones incluyen aire acondicionado, nevera, microondas, cafetera, ducha, secador de pelo y armario. En el hostal o pensión, cada habitación incluye baño privado y ropa de cama.
Reno Romantic Couples Retreat ofrece bañera de hidromasaje.
Reno-Sparks Livestock Events Center está a 4,1 km del alojamiento, y Centro de Convenciones Reno-Sparks está a 4,1 km.

Os quartos dispõem de ar condicionado, um frigorífico, um micro-ondas, máquina de café, chuveiro, um secador de cabelo e roupeiro. No alojamento, todos os quartos incluem casa de banho privativa e roupa de cama.
